# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write Kubernetes Deployment manifests with Istio sidecar injection disabled using sidecar.istio.io/inject:"false" annotation. Skip sidecar proxies for certain services that need direct network access without mesh policies. This is for services that require low latency without proxy overhead.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: example-app-no-istio
  labels:
    app: example-app-no-istio
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: example-app-no-istio
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: example-app-no-istio
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: example-app
          image: nginx:latest # Replace with your actual application image
          ports:
            - containerPort: 80
---
apiVersion: apps/v1
kind: Deployment
metadata:
  name: another-app-no-istio
  labels:
    app: another-app-no-istio
spec:
  replicas: 1
  selector:
    matchLabels:
      app: another-app-no-istio
  template:
    metadata:
      labels:
        app: another-app-no-istio
      annotations:
        sidecar.istio.io/inject: "false"
    spec:
      containers:
        - name: another-app
          image: busybox:latest # Replace with your actual application image
          command: ["sh", "-c", "echo 'Hello from another-app' && sleep 3600"]
          ports:
            - containerPort: 8080
